ground_truth.title: Top 10 eLearning Companies Taking the Stage in 2025 and Beyond
ground_truth.author: Sofia Kondrat
ground_truth.main_content: During the COVID pandemic, e-learning cropped up as a means of enabling educational cohesion. In this context, eLearning compares educational practices such as online learning, virtual learning, distance education, mobile learning, and learning management systems. As we cooperate with educators, mentors, and businesses on this landscape, we observe a shift toward eLearning as the favored instructional method. There are currently 6,582 companies on LinkedIn with the keyword "eLearning," 28,230 with the keyword "e-learning," and a market size of $400 billion expected by 2026. The majority of these agencies are new to the scene. However, some industry titans are as close to household names as agencies can get. In this article, EducateMe looks at the top elearning companies in the US. We’ll also explore the 6 biggest online learning platforms with the most users. Best eLearning Companies Rewriting Education History Here are the top online learning companies to keep an eye on. eLearning management companies: EducateMe, Gurucan Marketplaces for selling online courses: Maven, Teachable, and Udemy. Corporate training platforms: Docebo, TovutiLMS, AcademyOcean, and iSpring Learn. Online Education Companies: AffinitySpace, Guild. Elearning Management Companies Companies that specialize in e-learning management provide robust online learning management systems (LMS) that include all the toolkits that students and educators might require. #1. EducateMe EducateMe stands out as one of the best online education companies for corporate training, encompassing employee onboarding, upskilling, extended enterprise, and customer training. With robust white-labeling capabilities and seamless integration via API and Zapier, EducateMe empowers users to swiftly set up and launch fully branded eLearning courses within hours. This eLearning company boasts powerful online learning automation tools, as well as engagement tools, live sessions, detailed data analytics, video conferencing, and networking features, all in one intuitive solution. EducateMe offers a free trial with full access to all features - including its powerful AI assistant - so you can experience the platform’s full potential before committing. EducateMe in brief: Engagement Learning: This learning management system offers tools for cohort and self-paced learning, including peer-to-peer discussions, personalized feedback tools, a built-in messenger, instructor reviews, live session hosting, notifications, and quizzes. Assignment Management: Managing assignments is seamless with features like deadline management, group assignments, progress tracking, data-driven insights, individual file management, and real-time status updates. Automation: The platform provides automated reporting, streamlined assignment management, live session scheduling, drag-and-drop course creation, and AI-powered recommendations to enhance employee skills and professional knowledge. Data-Based Learning: Boost learner engagement and course effectiveness using the progress tracker, automated reporting, individual learner statistics, feedback management, and a focused calendar. Integration Capabilities: A wide variety of integrations enhance the efficiency and enjoyment of the educational process. #2. Gurucan Gurucan is a versatile eLearning platform designed to simplify the creation and management of online courses, memberships, and coaching programs. Tailored for entrepreneurs, educators, and businesses, Gurucan combines powerful features with user-friendly design to deliver exceptional online learning experiences. Gurucan in brief Comprehensive Course Creation: Effortlessly build and customize courses with multimedia content, quizzes, and assignments, all within an intuitive drag-and-drop interface. Membership Management: Easily manage memberships, including subscription plans, access controls, and member communications, to foster a thriving learning community. Coaching Programs: Design and deliver personalized coaching programs with built-in scheduling, progress tracking, and communication tools. Marketing Tools: Boost your reach with integrated marketing features such as email campaigns, push notifications, landing pages, and sales funnels. Mobile App: Provide learners with a seamless mobile experience through Gurucan’s native app, allowing access to content anytime, anywhere. Marketplaces for Selling Online Courses Elearning marketplaces have several advantages for customers and instructors. A marketplace gives instructors access to its existing customer base and a head start on marketing in exchange for a percentage of their sales. Students have easy and affordable access to high-quality educational resources. You may also be interested: Best Course Creation Software #3. Maven Maven is an elearning platform and cohort-based learning provider that empowers instructors to create and monetize cohort-based courses. Its primary services include accelerators, a marketplace for cohort courses, and community building. Maven provides an elearning prototype that can be implemented in a SaaS or Platforms setting. The SaaS model meets the fundamental requirements of learners and creators, while the Platform model expands the SaaS capabilities to include high-quality education and solutions. Maven in brief Custom Course Creation: Create interactive courses with multimedia content, quizzes, and assignments using an easy-to-use drag-and-drop editor. Community Engagement: Foster a vibrant learning community with built-in discussion forums, live sessions, and peer-to-peer interaction tools. Analytics and Reporting: Monitor learner progress and course performance with detailed analytics and reporting features. Marketing Tools: Enhance your course visibility with integrated marketing tools, including email campaigns and sales funnels. #4. Teachable Teachable is a venture-backed e-learning company that provides instructors with the tools they need to create their own online classes and turn their expertise into a sellable product. The platform is currently used by over 100,000 different course developers. Teachable allows instructors to create any type of course they want, whether it's entirely recorded in advance or a mix of live and recorded lessons. Services such as branding, ecommerce management, community building, and self-paced education are among its most important offerings. Teachable in brief Course Creation: Easily build and customize courses with video, audio, text, and quizzes using Teachable’s intuitive editor. Sales and Marketing: Boost your reach with integrated sales pages, email marketing, and affiliate programs. Analytics: Track student progress and course performance with comprehensive analytics. Payment Processing: Securely accept payments with built-in payment processing and multiple currency support. Mobile App: Offer a seamless learning experience with Teachable’s mobile-friendly platform. Community Building: Engage learners with discussion forums and direct messaging. #5. Udemy Udemy is an elearning company & marketplace that streamlines the enrollment and completion of e-learning courses, assisting professionals to pursue new careers, advance in existing careers, and enrich their lives. Udemy provides an international community for ingenious instructors to share their knowledge with a global audience using innovative tools and materials. Udemy's biggest selling point is its sheer size. Note: The eLearning platform houses more than 200,000 courses on topics like design, development, writing, business management, networking, Cybersecurity, and more. Udemy in brief Course Marketplace: Access a wide range of courses created by experts in various fields. Instructor Tools: Create engaging online courses with video lessons, quizzes, and assignments. Global Reach: Reach millions of students worldwide through Udemy’s established platform. Revenue Generation: Monetize your knowledge with revenue-sharing models and promotional opportunities. Mobile Learning: Enable students to learn anytime, anywhere with a mobile app. Community Interaction: Engage with learners through Q&A, direct messaging, and course announcements. Corporate Training Companies Corporate training companies offer a space where organizations can develop training courses and tools for their employees. The goal of a corporate training program is to upskill or reskill the workforce to advance personal and professional development. Such programs take place in a one-on-one or group setting, and it's frequently instructor-led. #6. Docebo Docebo learning management system offers a suite of AI-based tools for corporate education (employee training, compliance training, onboarding, etc.), and client & partner training. The employee e learning environment is best suited to medium-sized and large businesses. Docebo in brief AI-Powered Learning: Leverage AI to personalize learning experiences and improve engagement. Course Management: Create and manage online courses with a user-friendly interface and a variety of multimedia tools. Advanced Analytics: Gain insights into learner progress and training effectiveness with detailed analytics and reporting. Integration Capabilities: Seamlessly integrate with other business systems and tools via API and connectors. Mobile Learning: Provide flexible learning options with Docebo’s mobile app. Engagement Tools: Enhance learner engagement with social learning, gamification, and collaborative features. #7. Tovuti Learning Management System Tovuti learning management system is a comprehensive e-learning platform that empowers businesses and individuals to reach their full intellectual potential. The cloud-based solution equips users with the tools necessary to develop high-quality eLearning programs for the purpose of training their staff, partners, or customers. Tovuti’s key services include corporate training, elearning, learning, and training management. Tovuti in brief Course Authoring: Build dynamic online courses with multimedia content, interactive modules, and assessments using Tovuti’s easy-to-use tools. User Management: Efficiently manage users, groups, and roles with robust administrative features. Engagement Tools: Boost engagement with gamification, badges, leaderboards, and social learning elements. Reporting and Analytics: Track and analyze learner progress and course effectiveness with detailed reports. #8. AcademyOcean AcademyOcean is one of the best e-learning platforms because it provides enterprises with the tools necessary to create and deliver custom training for their employees, clients, and partners. Using this learning management system, educators, and entrepreneurs can create customizable courses, engage learners, and offer staff educational processes. AcademyOcean in brief Course Creation: Online course development with multimedia content, quizzes, and interactive elements using a simple drag-and-drop editor. Automated Learning Paths: Create automated learning paths to guide learners through their training journey. Engagement Tools: Enhance learner engagement with certificates, gamification, and interactive elements. Analytics and Reporting: Gain insights into learner progress and training effectiveness with comprehensive analytics and reporting. Customization: Personalize the platform with branding options and customizable themes. Online Education Companies eLearning training companies provide organizations with digital learning solutions for employee education and professional development, offering a wide range of customizable eLearning courses and interactive content. These companies leverage advanced technologies and instructional design to enhance learning experiences, improve skill acquisition, and support career growth. #9. AffinitySpace AffinitySpace provides social and dynamic learning experiences tailored to modern workplaces. With a focus on collaboration, self-awareness, and real-world application, their neuroscience-backed content ensures effective and engaging training. AffinitySpace  in brief Cohort Programs: These multi-week social learning journeys are customized to meet organizational needs, featuring live sessions led by industry experts and thought leaders. Emphasizing leadership, wellbeing, resilience, and human skills development, participants benefit from peer collaboration and the integration of learnings. Affinity Experiences: Designed for maximum impact, these dynamic and scalable two-hour online learning sessions focus on essential skills for the future of work. Delivered by experts, these experiences incorporate interactive, neuroscience-backed content and seamlessly integrate into participants' workflow, prioritizing fun, collaboration, and practical application. #10. Guild Guild is an innovative platform dedicated to employee skilling and career development, providing comprehensive educational opportunities tailored to working adults. By connecting employees with high-quality online learning programs and removing financial barriers, Guild fosters equitable access to online education and supports career growth. Learning Marketplace: Employees can choose from a wide range of programs, from degrees to short-form skills courses, all offered by vetted partners known for delivering positive outcomes for adult learners. This diverse marketplace ensures that employees have access to relevant and effective educational opportunities. Tuition-Paid Learning: Guild facilitates direct payment between employers and learning partners, making education accessible to those who are often left out. By covering tuition costs, Guild helps eliminate major financial barriers, promoting equity in access to education. Career Support and Coaching: Dedicated career coaches and career discovery tools help employees identify and prepare for new roles within their company. This personalized support ensures that employees can effectively reach their career goals and transition into new opportunities. Measuring Impact: As employees progress in their programs, companies benefit from improved talent attraction, retention, diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI), and career mobility. Guild provides tools to measure and grow the impact of educational programs, demonstrating a clear return on investment (ROI) for employers. E-learning Companies with the Most Users Aside from Udemy and Teachable, these elearning companies have the most traffic in the industry. However, this doesn’t make them the best online learning platforms overall. We listed them for recognition. LinkedIn Learning: LinkedIn Learning is an American online learning provider and a subsidiary of LinkedIn. edX: edX is an American MOOC provider created by Harvard and MIT, hosting online university-level courses. Cousera: Coursera Inc. is a U.S.-based MOOC platform that works with universities and other organizations to offer online courses, certifications, and more. Skillshare: Skillshare is an online learning community for creators. Anyone can take an online class, watch video courses, create projects, and even teach a class themselves. Thinkific: Thinkific is an all-in-one online learning platform to help educators create, market & sell their own online courses. Kajabi: Kajabi LLC is an Irvine, California-based SaaS technology company that develops one of the best e learning platforms for creators and entrepreneurs to create, market and sell digital content. Conclusion There's no denying that e-learning is on the rise, which means that more e-learning institutions will likely spring up at an alarming rate. Those who are serious about making a name for themselves and playing a significant role in the future of education technology will need to develop a universal platform that can accommodate all types of users. Our article discusses a few of the top e-learning companies that we believe will be at the forefront of technological advancements. The primary goal of EducateMe is to provide cutting-edge features to businesses and educators who want to maximize revenue and training while staying current with technological developments. If you're ready to build your tutoring business on top of future-ready technologies and integrations, we're here to guide you through the process.
